terms.intro: Welcome to EarnLumens. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By creating an account or using any part of the EarnLumens platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions, as well as our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
sections.body: EarnLumens is a multi-tenant content platform built on the Stellar network. The main tenant is currently focused on financial education, and the platform enables new instances for other verticals through verification credentials. Creators can publish content (videos, audio, images, and resources) and set prices in XLM (Stellar Lumens). Users can purchase, view, and interact with this content.

sections.heading: 3. Account Registration
sections.body: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

sections.heading: 4. Content and Intellectual Property
sections.body: Creators retain ownership of the content they publish on EarnLumens. By publishing, creators grant EarnLumens a non-exclusive, worldwide license to display, distribute, and promote the content on the platform. Users may not reproduce, redistribute, or resell purchased content without the creator's explicit permission.

sections.heading: 5. Payments and Transactions
sections.body: Payments made through EarnLumens constitute direct, exclusive, and independent transactions between the buyer and the creator, conducted using XLM on the Stellar network. EarnLumens acts solely as a technological platform for publication and technical intermediation, and does not intervene as a seller, buyer, agent, custodian, collection agent, fiduciary, or guarantor of any transaction between users. Prices are set exclusively by creators, and EarnLumens may apply applicable platform fees. Unless applicable law expressly provides otherwise, all sales are final, irrevocable, and non-refundable. If EarnLumens detects, receives reports of, or reasonably suspects fraud, abuse, breach, or any other unlawful conduct or conduct contrary to these Terms, it may temporarily or permanently suspend, restrict, or cancel the account of the creator involved and adopt any internal measures it deems reasonable. Notwithstanding the foregoing, EarnLumens assumes no obligation to intervene in disputes between users and does not guarantee, under any circumstances, the reversal of transactions, the recovery of assets, or the restitution, return, or refund of transferred funds. The user expressly acknowledges and accepts the inherent risks of blockchain transactions, including their potentially irreversible nature, as well as sole responsibility for network fees, address errors, amounts sent, or purchase decisions.

sections.heading: 6. Prohibited Conduct
sections.body: You agree not to: (a) upload harmful, illegal, or infringing content; (b) impersonate others; (c) attempt to exploit or disrupt the platform; (d) use automated tools to scrape or access the platform without authorization; (e) engage in any activity that violates applicable laws or regulations.

sections.heading: 7. Termination
sections.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time if you violate these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the platform ceases immediately, though provisions that by their nature should survive will remain in effect.

sections.heading: 8. Disclaimers
sections.body: The platform is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind. EarnLumens does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any content published by creators. We are not responsible for any losses resulting from Stellar network transactions.

sections.heading: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, EarnLumens, its affiliates, directors, employees, contractors, and representatives shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, punitive, or any other damages arising from or related to the use or inability to use the platform, transactions between users, content published by creators, fraudulent or unlawful conduct of third parties, unmet commercial expectations, loss of data, loss of opportunity, lost profits, reputation, clientele, or for losses or damages arising from blockchain transactions, including those that are irreversible. In particular, EarnLumens shall not be liable for failure to deliver content, or for the quality, legality, authenticity, accuracy, or usefulness of content offered by creators, nor for returns, impossible chargebacks, claims between users, or loss of funds. In any event where, despite the foregoing, any liability of EarnLumens is legally determined, such liability shall be limited to the amount actually received by EarnLumens as a platform fee in the specific transaction that gave rise to the claim.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms at any time. We will endeavor to inform users of material changes through the platform, but it is your responsibility to review the Terms periodically. Your continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

sections.heading: 11. Contact
sections.body: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal{'@'}earnlumens.org.

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how EarnLumens collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly (account details, profile information) and information generated through your use of the platform (transaction history, viewing activity, device information).

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to: provide and improve our services, process transactions, communicate with you, ensure platform security, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.heading: 3. Data Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who assist in operating the platform, or when required by law.

sections.heading: 4. Data Security
sections.body: We implement commercially reasonable security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights
sections.body: You may access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data by contacting us. We will make reasonable efforts to address your request within a reasonable timeframe.
